title: BGTEC Serrated Carbide Masonry Drill Bit Set - 5PCS 5/6/8/10/12MM Multi-Purpose Wood Drill Bits for Masonry, Wood, Plastic, Brick, Tile, Glass, Concrete & Marble
features: 【Size】 Pack of 5 pcs 5/6/8/10/12MM masonry drill bit set, Corresponding working depth: 58/58/74/80/80mm. Shank diameter: 6.3MM

【Precision Drilling】Crisscross Serrated Tip Design – Eliminates skidding and deviation common with traditional drill bits. Ensures exact hole positioning, especially on smooth surfaces like tiles & glass—no more frustrating re-drilling

【Universal Drilling】One Bit for All Jobs! Easily drills through wood, plastic, brick, masonry, tiles, and even glass/marble! Tungsten carbide tip + hardened steel body delivers powerful penetration, even in concrete (avoid rebar). Use with coolant for longer bit life
【High-Efficiency Chip Removal】Deepened Spiral Flute Design – 50% faster drilling with smooth debris ejection. Prevents clogging for cleaner, uninterrupted deep/hole drilling—saves time & effort

【Fits Most Drills】6.3mm Quick-fit Hex Shank – Compatible with all standard drills & bench drills. Extended bit length for hard-to-reach spaces. Best used with 2000-5000 RPM drills (24V+ cordless recommended for tough materials)
description: Product Description 5 sizes 3/16" (5mm): Overall length-3 7/8" (98mm); Blade length-3/8" (10mm); Working depth-2 1/4" (58mm) 1/4" (6mm): Overall length-4" (100mm); Blade length-3/8" (10mm); Working depth-2 1/4" (58mm) 5/16" (8mm): Overall length-4 1/2" (115mm); Blade length-1/2" (12mm); Working depth-2 15/16" (74mm) 3/8" (10mm): Overall length-4 3/4" (120mm); Blade length-1/2" (13mm); Working depth-3 1/8" (80mm) 1/2" (12mm): Overall length-4 13/16" (123mm); Blade length-9/16" (15mm); Working depth-3 1/8" (80mm) PRECISE DRILLING Sharp, wear-resistant tip for reduced slipping and precise drilling. Drill vertically—no 45° angle needed MACHINE Hand drills, bench drills, and cordless drills (≥24V recommended). Drilling mode only (no hammer/impact) QUICK-FIT SHANK Extended shank + 6.3MM hex shank. Equipped with a quick-change chuck for faster and easier installation and removal MAUTI-MATERIAL Dry: Wood, PVC, foam brick, tile, cement, concrete (avoid rebar). Wet: Porcelain, ceramic, marble, glass Can they be used in impact drills? No. The drilling mode can only be selected in flat drilling mode, impact and hammering modes cannot be used Are they suitable for drilling through rebar? Not suitable. This product is only suitable for aluminum, stainless steel, and copper up to 3MM thick, not for steel rebar. How resistant is this product to wear and tear The drill bit is made of carbide and tungsten steel, two materials known for their durability and ability to withstand hard materials. Therefore there is a long service life. However, it is recommended to use it with water on harder materials. Does this set come with a case? Yes, each set comes in a transparent case
